overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima depicting a samurai character exploring a serene Japanese garden. The character walks along stone paths and wooden bridges past ponds with floating lanterns, waterfalls, and cherry blossoms, with a snow-capped mountain visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: Japanese garden pond edge with stone pathways

events.description: Snow-capped mountain peak becomes visible from behind the tree line

agents.ego_description: Samurai character walking slowly along the pond edge, observing the garden scenery

entered.detail: Distinctive tall pine tree with layered branches standing in the pond
White paper lanterns floating on the pond surface
Clear reflective water with visible stones beneath the surface
Mossy stone pathway along the pond edge
White flowering trees covering the background hills

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a tranquil Japanese garden pond with floating lanterns and a distinctive tall pine tree. The character walks along a mossy stone path as a snow-capped mountain gradually reveals itself in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: Garden approach to waterfall and traditional villa

events.description: Waterfall and moss-covered traditional building come into view ahead

agents.ego_description: Character walking toward the waterfall and traditional building, following the stone path

entered.detail: Cascading waterfall flowing down mossy rocks into the pond
Traditional Japanese wooden structure with moss-covered roof built into the rock face
Traditional stone lantern along the path edge
Tree with bright yellow foliage near the building

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a stunning waterfall and traditional moss-covered building built into the rock face. The snow-capped mountain now dominates the center background while the initial pine tree recedes from view.

scene_state.functional_zone: Wooden arched bridge crossing the garden stream

events.description: Character steps onto wooden bridge and begins crossing

agents.ego_description: Character crossing the wooden bridge over the pond, moving from one shore to the other

entered.detail: Arched wooden bridge with railings spanning the water

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a wooden arched bridge over the pond. The bridge creates a brief enclosed corridor, temporarily obscuring the waterfall and building as the character moves to the opposite shore.

scene_state.functional_zone: Rocky shoreline along the garden pond with distant views

events.description: Distant torii gate becomes visible across the pond through the trees

agents.ego_description: Character walking along the rocky shoreline, following the water's edge

entered.detail: Gravel and stone shore along the pond edge
Red torii gate visible in the far distance across the water
Gnarled pine tree growing from the rocky outcrop

segments.scene_description: Walking along a rocky gravel shore, the character circles the pond with the water now on the right. A distant torii gate becomes visible through the trees, and the waterfall reappears in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: Mossy stone staircase ascending to traditional building

events.description: Character begins ascending the stone steps toward the building

agents.ego_description: Character climbing moss-covered stone steps leading up to the traditional building

entered.detail: Weathered stone staircase with moss growing between the steps
Large boulders covered in thick green moss flanking the stairs

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character ascending mossy stone steps toward the traditional wooden building. The pond and shoreline recede from view as the character climbs higher, approaching the structure built into the rock face.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a tranquil Japanese garden that shifts from an open pond view to a focused crossing of a wooden bridge. It begins beside a pond with floating lanterns and a tall pine tree, following the character along a mossy stone path as a snow-capped mountain gradually reveals itself in the distance. As the character advances, the pine tree recedes and the scene opens up to a stunning waterfall and a traditional moss-covered building built into the rock face, with the mountain now dominating the center background. The camera then follows the character onto a wooden arched bridge, which creates a brief enclosed corridor that temporarily obscures the waterfall and building before reaching the opposite shore.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a low-lying shoreline to an elevated vantage point beside a traditional structure. It begins with the character walking along a rocky gravel shore, circling a pond with the water to the right as a distant torii gate and waterfall emerge through the trees. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts from the open waterfront toward a steep ascent of mossy stone steps. The pond and shoreline gradually recede from view while the camera climbs higher, finally approaching a wooden building integrated into the surrounding rock face.
